Product: Chelated Zinc 50 mg
Description: Zinc is an essential micronutrient found in cells throughout your body and is crucial to many aspects of your health. Some of the benefits it provides include: Helping strengthen your immune system Supporting your body’s protein production Assisting your body in making DNA Helping wound heal Chelated Zinc Supplements Chelated zinc is a type of zinc supplement that contains zinc that’s been attached to a chelating agent. What are chelating agents? These are chemical compounds that bond with metal ions (like zinc) to create a stable, water-soluble product that the body can easily absorb. Chelated minerals (like chelated zinc) are minerals that have been chemically combined with amino acids. The body absorbs amino acids effectively, so combining the amino acids with the minerals means the body can absorb them more easily and efficiently. This gives chelated minerals higher bioavailability than non-chelated minerals. Since it’s difficult for your body to efficiently absorb zinc on its own, zinc is often attached to a chelating agent in supplements.
